title: The Outlaws
tmdbOverview: In Chinatown, law and order is turned upside down when a trio of feral Chinese gangsters arrive, start terrorizing civilians, and usurping territory. The beleaguered local gangsters team up with the police, lead by the badass loose cannon Ma Seok-do, to bring them down. Based on a true story.
synopsis: Released in 2017, The Outlaws is a action, crime and thriller film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a MA 15+ certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
